arts.sum: A 36-year-old woman has been handed an 18-year prison sentence for assaulting Brentford FC centre-forward Yoane Wissa (28) and attempting to kidnap his child, as reported by L’Equipe and AFP. On July 1st,…

Brentford have bolstered their defensive options by completing the loan signing of 20-year-old Michael Kayode from Fiorentina, marking their first acquisition of the January transfer window. The deal includes a potential permanent transfer option for the summer. The post OFFICIAL: Brentford Sign Michael Kayode appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Ajer fit to return for Brentford
arts.sum: Kristoffer Ajer has been passed fit to return for Brentford against Crystal Palace on Sunday. Defender Ajer has missed the past six matches with an ankle injury. “Kristoffer is available, trained the whole week and will be involved with the squad on Sunday, so it’s very positive,” said Bees boss Thomas Frank. Frank, who reiterated […] The post Ajer fit to return for Brentford appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Brentford chief reiterates stance on Wissa after another offer from Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest boss Nuno Espirito Santo is keen to sign Wissa. Thomas Frank has reiterated that Brentford have no intention of selling Yoane Wissa. Nottingham Forest recently offered close to £22m for the Bees forward, having had a £15m bid rejected during the summer. Brentford have again indicated that Wissa is not for sale.
